title: Entity Pipeline
content:
CYCLE N
                           |
                     +-----+-----+
                     |           |
                  WRITER      CRITERIA
                  sources     shifts every
                  fragments   5 cycles
                     |           |
                     v           v
                 +----------- CHECKER ----------+
                 |   evaluates against criteria  |
                 |                               |
              flagged                        clean
                 |                               |
                 v                               |
              CUTTER                             |
              removes flagged,                   |
              old, long                          |
                 |                               |
          +------+------+                        |
          |             |                        |
       removed     surviving                     |
          |             |                        |
          v             v                        v
                    READER
                    interprets patterns:
                    survival, echo, density, void
                           |
                           v
                       NARRATOR
                       translates cycle
                       into plain language
                           |
                           v
                       LOGGER
                       records stats

title: System Levels
content:
+--------------------------------------------------+
  |  LEVEL 5: HIGHLIGHTS                             |
  |  your marks on level 4. private.                 |
  +--------------------------------------------------+
  |  LEVEL 4: METALOG                                |
  |  kerem + architect talking about levels 1-3.     |
  |  uses ASIDE to enter.                            |
  +--------------------------------------------------+
  |  LEVEL 3: NARRATIVE                              |
  |  what the Narrator says happened.                |
  |  plain-language cycle recap.                     |
  +--------------------------------------------------+
  |  LEVEL 2: OPERATIONS                             |
  |  marks, flags, cuts, annotations.                |
  |  what the entities did.                          |
  +--------------------------------------------------+
  |  LEVEL 1: DOCUMENT                               |
  |  the fragments. living and removed.              |
  |  the raw material.                               |
  +--------------------------------------------------+

  - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
  CHANGELOG sits outside this stack.
  it records construction, not content.
  - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

title: Agent Map
content:
GENERATION N
                           |
                     +-----+-----+
                     |           |
                  WRITER      CRITERIA
                  sources     shifts every
                  fragments   5 generations
                     |           |
                     v           v
                 +----------- CHECKER ----------+
                 |   evaluates against criteria  |
                 |                               |
              flagged                        clean
                 |                               |
                 v                               |
              CUTTER                             |
              removes flagged,                   |
              old, long                          |
                 |                               |
          +------+------+                        |
          |             |                        |
       removed     surviving                     |
          |             |                        |
          v             v                        v
                    READER
                    interprets patterns:
                    survival, echo, density, void
                           |
                           v
                       NARRATOR
                       translates generation
                       into plain language
                           |
                           v
                       LOGGER
                       records stats

  -------------------------------------------------------
  OBSERVERS (outside the generation pipeline)
  -------------------------------------------------------

  ARCHITECT ----> metalog        responds to ASIDE,
                                 discusses system
                                 from outside

  THREADS -----> metalog         groups entries into
                                 conversation threads
                                 with summaries + tags

  EDITOR ------> display         revises language
                                 from gen 4 onward.
                                 strikethrough + replace.
                                 presentation only.

  TAXONOMIST --> vocabulary       classifies concepts,
                                 maintains naming.
                                 gen-N:Xa:Yr format.

  KEREM -------> highlights      marks on the metalog.
                                 private annotation layer.
                                 visible to all viewers.

title: System Levels
content:
+--------------------------------------------------+
  |  LEVEL 6: RULEBOOK                               |
  |  taxonomy, rules, character roster.               |
  |  changes shown with strikethrough.                |
  +--------------------------------------------------+
  |  LEVEL 5: HIGHLIGHTS                             |
  |  kerem's marks on the metalog. private.           |
  |  viewers can add their own (localStorage).        |
  +--------------------------------------------------+
  |  LEVEL 4: METALOG                                |
  |  kerem + architect. uses ASIDE to enter.          |
  |  thread index, tagged conversation groups.        |
  +--------------------------------------------------+
  |  LEVEL 3: NARRATIVE                              |
  |  what the Narrator says happened.                 |
  |  plain-language generation recap.                 |
  +--------------------------------------------------+
  |  LEVEL 2: OPERATIONS                             |
  |  marks, flags, removals, annotations.             |
  |  what the entities did. editor revisions here.    |
  +--------------------------------------------------+
  |  LEVEL 1: DOCUMENT                               |
  |  the fragments. active and removed.               |
  |  sourced from the metalog conversation.           |
  +--------------------------------------------------+

  CHANGELOG -----> construction record (perpendicular)
  SNAPSHOTS -----> frozen states (archival, forward-only)
  DIAGRAMS ------> structural sketches (old ones kept)
